description_long: This is a mid-calf black boot with a matte finish, featuring a prominent decorative silver chain wrapped around the ankle area. The boot has a wide shaft and a slightly rounded toe, giving it a robust and urban appearance. The upper material appears to be synthetic or leather, while the sole is thick and flat, likely made of rubber for durability and comfort. There is a pull tab at the back of the shaft for easy wearing. The boot lacks visible laces or fasteners, emphasizing a slip-on design. The overall style is modern and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments and streetwear fashion.
description: A black mid-calf boot with a silver chain detail and a wide, matte shaft, designed for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, wide shaft, and the silver chain detail across the front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the boot, the chain wrapping around the ankle, and the flat sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the pull tab at the top of the shaft and the chain encircling the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the chain and the boot's overall silhouette.
